# Issue Template

## Issue Type
Please select the type of issue you're reporting:

- [ ] Bug report
- [ ] Feature request
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Hardware issue
- [ ] Firmware issue
- [ ] Build/compilation problem
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Description
**Provide a clear and concise description of the issue or feature request.**

## Steps to Reproduce (for bugs)
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
**What you expected to happen.**

## Actual Behavior
**What actually happened.**

## Environment
**Please complete the following information:**
- Hardware version: [e.g. v1.0]
- Firmware version: [e.g. commit hash or version]
- Development environment: [e.g. Arduino IDE 2.0, PlatformIO]
- Operating system: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS, Linux]

## Screenshots/Logs
**If applicable, add screenshots, serial output, or error logs to help explain your problem.**

## Additional Context
**Add any other context about the problem here. This might include:**
- Related issues or discussions
- Potential solutions you've considered
- Impact on your project
- Any workarounds you've found

## Hardware Configuration (if relevant)
- ESP32 board model:
- AS7265x sensor mounting:
- Display type:
- Power supply:
- Custom modifications:

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for similar issues
- [ ] I have read the documentation
- [ ] I have provided all requested information
- [ ] This issue is related to the Open NDVI Handheld project
